|date=[[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]]<ref name="TEC" /> (48:3)<ref name="Months">The [[Battle of Orinda]]—which occurs a month before Nam Chorios, according to the ''New Essential Chronology''—occurs in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]]. The only way for Orinda to occur in 12 ABY and Nam Chorios in 13 ABY is if Nam Chorios was within a month of the division between the years, or 48:3; and Orinda must occur in 48:2, a month earlier.</ref>

{{Quote|The New Republic pressed its advantage and entered Moff Getelles's Antemeridian sector with two full ﬂeets. Getelles was powerless to stop them, and the sector (along with a huge chunk of neighboring space) became New Republic territory. Admiral Pellaeon, initially preoccupied with a protracted campaign against Adumar, eventually stopped his enemy from advancing into the heart of the Empire, though the effort cost him the Super Star Destroyer ''Reaper''.|[[Voren Na'al/Legends|Voren Na'al]]|<ref name="The New Essential Chronology">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref>}}
A '''campaign against Adumar''' took place in [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], at around the same time of the [[Battle of Nam Chorios]]. Shortly after the [[Battle of Adumar]], [[Imperial Remnant|Imperial]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]] launched a campaign in order to conquer the planet [[Adumar/Legends|Adumar]].<ref name="TEC" /> Thanks to his [[Command ship/Legends|command ship]], the [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] [[Reaper (Executor-class)|''Reaper'']], Pellaeon was initially victorious and executed [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|orbital bombardments]] against Adumar.<ref name="TNEGtC" /> However, Pellaeon was forced to suspend his attack due to a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] intervention in the [[Antemeridian sector/Legends|Antemeridian sector]] against Imperial [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Tol Getelles|Getelles]].<ref name="TEC" />
